title: New Life!
overview: Natsuno Hanabi has left the city of Tokyo in order to go to high school. She has plans to stay in a high school dorm which she thought was going to be fancy, but when she arrives, she finds that's not the case. And the other residents of the dorms are quite eccentric.

title: Secret Place
overview: Konomi gets angry that Tsukishiro Yuu has way too much skin contact with Hanabi, and runs out of Tachibanakan. Hanabi goes looking for her, and they remember the fun times they had together when they were young.

title: Spying and Sleeping Together
overview: Hanabi finds out that Iori, the quiet girl, moved in the day before she did. Hanabi doesn't understand anything about her, and Iori does strange things like cooling off naked after taking a bath. Hanabi wants to make friends with her, but...

title: Trials and Toilets
overview: Konomi is in trouble - the toilet's broken in the bathroom! She tries to go to a newly opened convenience store in the area, but it doesn't work out. Will she make it to the bathroom in time?

title: Summer Clothes and Closets
overview: Sonoa gets rescued from a bar by Yuu and is taken to Tachibanakan. Meanwhile, Iori and Hanabi get trapped in a closet together...

title: Welcome Party and Water Gun
overview: Sonoa gets drunk and ends up living at Tachibanakan. Yuu gets everyone to have a welcome party for Sonoa, so they meet by the riverside in appropriate outfits. Yuu has water guns waiting for them, and has everyone enter a "Water Gun Survival Game".

title: Meteor Shower and a Bucket
overview: There's a meteor shower visible tonight, and Tachibanakan is as lively as ever. Konomi invites Hanabi to go see the meteor shower from a nearby observation area. It turns out the observation area is well known for its special powers of love...

title: Fish and a Kiss
overview: Iori aggressively tries to make her feelings known to Hanabi. So Konomi enlists the help of Sonoa, who claims to be able to get any man. They both try to win Hanabi over, but it doesn't quite go as planned...

title: A Cold and Memories
overview: Hanabi catches a cold, but both Iori and Konomi have to go to school, so Sonoa is left to take care of Hanabi. But Sonoa has some quirks to her personality, and things don't quite turn out as expected when she tries to take care of Hanabi.

title: Hot Springs and Ping Pong
overview:
The members of Tachibanakan have arrived at the hot springs.

Konomi and Iori are fighting over Hanabi in the open-air bath,

Yu proposes a table tennis match for the right to bathe with Hanabi.

How will the table tennis match with Hanabi at stake turn out?

title: Summer Festival
overview:
After Hanabi and Iori get dressed in their yukata robes by Yoriko, they head off to the summer festival together.

Konomi is worried that something might happen while they're alone,

and tries to sneak after them, but...

Will things progress between them as they head off to the summer festival...?

title: Here, at Tachibanakan
overview:
Hanabi and Iori are enjoying the summer festival. Konomi searches for them.

Will Konomi be able to confess her feelings for Hanabi? What are Iori's true intentions?

A love triangle (?) centered around Hanabi reaches its climax at the summer festival.
